title: Subtasks and dashboard
excerpt: Are all of the widgets able to reflect subtasks as well?

posts.author: ryo (Ryosuke Aramaki)
posts.cookedHtml: Are all of the widgets able to reflect subtasks as well?

posts.author: mitchell.hudson (Mitchell hudson)
posts.cookedHtml:
@ryo

Are you referring to a monday.com build widget or a widget built using the Monday apps framework?

I think it would depend on the widget. If the widget has been built to work with subitems, then there shouldn’t be any issues. However, I know that a lot of widgets won’t support subitems due to the way that subitems operate.

posts.author: ryo (Ryosuke Aramaki)
posts.cookedHtml:
@mitchell.hudson
Yes, I am referring to the monday.com widget.
Do you know which widgets are supporting subtasks at the moment?

posts.author: mitchell.hudson (Mitchell hudson)
posts.cookedHtml:
@ryo I’m not 100% sure to be honest. I don’t think any widgets support subitems yet.

Subitems are quite a new feature and new functions for subitems are being released very often! I am sure it won’t be long before you can use subitems in dashboards.

posts.author: glaudasso (Gabri)
posts.cookedHtml:
@mitchell.hudson
Checking in to see if there are any updates on when dashboard widgets will support sub-items.
Trying to hit a Q4 KR that revolves around creating a dashboard to visualize sub-items status.
Thanks for any insights!

posts.author: TRB-monday.com (Talia)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @glaudasso, @mitchell.hudson, and @ryo, thanks all for posting about this!

At the moment, subitems are supported in the timeline (with a granted feature, you can write into support@monday.com and we will grant it to you from the back end), calendar, workload, and table widgets.

Let me know if you have any questions!

posts.author: glaudasso (Gabri)
posts.cookedHtml:
Thank you Talia!
Is there an ETA for when subitems will be supported by other types of dashboard widgets? In particular, bar charts?
Thank you!
